hibernate-mapping.query: select distinct user from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.AuthUser user join user.AuthRoleSet authRole join authRole.AuthOperationSet authOperation where authOperation.OperationId = :operation
select distinct user from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.AuthUser user join user.AuthRoleSet authRole where authRole.AuthDomain.DomainId = :authDomain
